---
title: "Thermal Habitat Area"
author: "Brandon Beltz"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(ecodata)
library(ecodata25)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)

# Replace 'thermal_habitat_gridded' with intended dataset
dataset<-ecodata::thermal_habitat_gridded
dataset24<-ecodata25::thermal_habitat_gridded

# Define dataset-specific arguments for plot functions
report<-list("MidAtlantic","NewEngland")
#variable<-list("seasonal","annual")
#plottype<-list("Stacked", "Catch")
#epu<-list("GB","GOM")
```

# Dataset Metrics {.tabset}

## `r paste(report[1])`
```{r, fig.show="hold", out.width="50%", echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ecodata::plot_thermal_habitat_gridded(report = report[1]) + 
  ggplot2::ggtitle("SOE 2026") + ggplot2::theme(plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 20))

ecodata25::plot_thermal_habitat_gridded(report = report[1]) + 
  ggplot2::ggtitle("SOE 2025") + ggplot2::theme(plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 20))
```
